# errors

**Instance Property**

Errors that occurred in the request.

## Declaration

```swift
readonly attribute CloudKit.CKError[] errors;
```

## Discussion

There’s one [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/CKError] object for each individual operation that failed.

## Handling Errors

- **hasErrors**: A Boolean value indicating whether errors occurred in the request.
